targets.rawSql:
SELECT bucket_start AS time,
       symbol AS metric,
       avg(avg_price) AS value
FROM financial_event_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket_start)
GROUP BY time, symbol
ORDER BY time;

SELECT bucket_start AS time,
       symbol AS metric,
       sum(total_quantity) AS value
FROM financial_event_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket_start)
GROUP BY time, symbol
ORDER BY time;

SELECT bucket_start AS time,
       scenario AS metric,
       avg(avg_ingestion_latency_ms) AS value
FROM financial_event_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket_start)
GROUP BY time, scenario
ORDER BY time;

SELECT bucket_start AS time,
       'p95' AS metric,
       max(p95_ingestion_latency_ms) AS value
FROM financial_event_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket_start)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT bucket_start AS time,
       scenario AS metric,
       sum(event_count) / nullif(extract(epoch FROM max(bucket_end) - min(bucket_start)), 0) AS value
FROM financial_event_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket_start)
GROUP BY time, scenario
ORDER BY time;

SELECT event_time,
       processing_time,
       producer_id,
       symbol,
       price,
       quantity,
       scenario,
       ingestion_latency_ms,
       event_lag_ms
FROM financial_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 20;
